# 新闻速递 2026-05-03

## Coupang
- Coupang因涉嫌反垄断行为将于六月面临FTC判决，可能对其运营和声誉产生负面影响。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxPdC1lWVl5MTRhUzRYR3JMTWNmZTAteGNZcVhGd2VNdFdpY1dhZzJheTM5UGlORXFvSEsta2ZzU29oVWZBOWJmak1HdnhFTTh4TEZ5TDZOZE5xTFZIcnAteXNsWFJBdlVDTGZJeU9FZ1pTZklIbkcyenBOVlh5U09OY2RfS0xtRWNWYUFuV3BtMjQ0Zjl0T3czcmxPeWFnaWxn?oc=5)）
- Coupang发布财报前，Barclays上调其目标股价，此举或反映机构看好其业绩并提振投资者信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## Shopee
- 市场关注Sea Limited (SE)股票，分析其是否为当前值得买入的投资标的，影响潜在投资者决策。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE1IZ05pYzRla2ttSUpEZUxPNGZhVDNQRnQ5R3JhRTMyUW45ZzV2VW9PZXQ1VC16Q1dPSDM4T2I4TjMyc1A4RHpCNnYtdVR5MTVDVXdSVWpzNnBhNFFFd2hSQ01JN25MU3BRY3hoRFJtTkdnNTAxLTA3bkZDcnBmNzg?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre发布财报前，分析师调整目标价，反映市场对其业绩表现的预期和潜在股价波动。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTFBJNmlJQ3M0dTlIUU05NHQ5b2Y2Vjl5bzJRcnpLcEpVd2sxN0tubmg5MTJzX0lHNnRoakFpQWRobXM5cS1zS3BhMjRyaldfeVJ3SklrSG5YQXhZdm9EdTRyRzRsT3V4WW5OcVdjT1Jkd01oWHBNaGNYMjZGeWc?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre一季度财报发布前，Barclays调整其目标股价，预示分析师对其业绩预期有所变化并可能影响股价。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOSG9xb2dyazN6dzJocldMejc4cmZabFpjUDhKTVZrVkdGTWc0V2Uwekc4aDhKb0NtcFQzQnpiMjhYTUJhd0JnR0xQR2lTYnpkdjdiYzBKVVhST0wyTTZ1YzNVcmRVd3hlaFZWZG1rVHBzdWpKeF9OWDl6dzZmN2FVanhFX0taU04xSE9rVzkzYVZkTmdYZDFINW9DTFN5cDA3c0tZWQ?oc=5)）
